messages.content: 以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段话：叶片后缘发生缺口损伤对VD的影响规律与前缘发生缺口损伤时大致相同，但是叶片后缘发生缺口损伤后VD的变化程度相较于前缘发生缺口损伤的叶片会大幅度减弱。相比于正常叶片出口截面VD沿径向分布曲线，叶片后缘发生缺口损伤时，叶片出口截面VD沿径向分布曲线只会发生微小改变。

The influence pattern of notch damage on vibration displacement (VD) of the blade trailing edge is generally similar to that of the notch damage on the leading edge. However, the degree of change in VD after the occurrence of notch damage at the blade trailing edge is significantly weaker compared to that at the leading edge. In comparison with the radial distribution curve of VD in the exit section of a normal blade, when notch damage occurs at the blade trailing edge, only minor changes will occur in the radial distribution curve of VD at the blade exit section.
以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段话：由上文所述，叶片后缘掉块损伤对压气机气动性能影响极小，且发生在相同叶高的掉块使压气机气动参数变化趋势相同，所以后续对于叶片通道流场的研究主要集中在叶片前缘发生掉块对压气机气动性能影响的分析

As mentioned above, the impact of blade trailing edge block loss damage on the aerodynamic performance of compressor is minimal. Additionally, block loss occurring at the same blade height results in similar trends of changes in the aerodynamic parameters of the compressor. Therefore, subsequent studies on the flow field in the blade passage mainly focus on analyzing the effects of block loss at the blade leading edge on the aerodynamic performance of the compressor.
以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段话：由上文所述，叶片后缘缺口损伤对压气机气动性能影响极小，且发生在相同叶高的缺口使压气机气动参数变化趋势相同，所以后续对于叶片通道流场的研究主要集中在叶片前缘发生缺口对压气机气动性能影响的分析

As mentioned above, the impact of blade trailing edge notch damage on the aerodynamic performance of the compressor is minimal. Additionally, the occurrence of notches at the same blade height leads to similar trends in the changes of aerodynamic parameters of the compressor. Therefore, subsequent studies on the flow field in the blade passage primarily focus on analyzing the effects of notches occurring at the blade leading edge on the aerodynamic performance of the compressor.

以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段话：为了揭示转子叶片的缺口损伤影响压气机气动性能的机理，造成稳定裕度下降、近失速点流量增大的原因，这里进一步对压气机叶片通道流场结构进行分析。由于转子叶片发生缺口损伤后，压气机堵塞、峰值、近失速流量点都发生了较大的偏移，所以依旧选取统一的设计流量为主要研究工况。根据缺口损伤发生的特征位置，选取了叶顶、叶中、叶根三个特征截面，图15(a)、(b)、(c)给出了仿真得到的设计流量点附近不同叶片模型 95%、50%、15%叶高截面相对马赫数分布。

To reveal the mechanism behind the impact of notch damage on the aerodynamic performance of rotor blades, as well as the reasons for the decrease in stability margin and increased flow rate near the surge point, a further analysis of the flow field structure in the compressor blade passage is conducted. Since significant deviations occur in compressor blockage, peak flow rate, and surge flow rate after rotor blade notch damage, a uniform design flow rate is still selected as the main research condition. Considering the characteristic positions where the notch damage occurs, three characteristic sections - blade tip, mid-blade, and blade root - are selected. Figures 15(a), (b), and (c) show the distribution of relative Mach numbers at the 95%, 50%, and 15% blade heights, respectively, around the design flow rate point obtained from simulations.

以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段话：为了揭示转子叶片的缺口损伤影响压气机气动性能的机理，也就是造成压气机稳定裕度下降、近失速点流量增大的原因，这里进一步对压气机叶片通道流场结构进行分析。由于转子叶片发生缺口损伤后，压气机堵塞、峰值、近失速流量点都发生了较大的偏移，所以依旧选取统一的设计流量为主要研究工况。根据缺口损伤发生的特征位置，选取了叶顶、叶中、叶根三个特征截面，图15(a)、(b)、（c）展示了仿真得到的设计流量点附近不同叶片模型 95%、50%、15%叶高截面的相对马赫数分布。

To elucidate the mechanism behind the impact of notch damage on the aerodynamic performance of rotor blades, specifically the causes for the decrease in stability margin and the increase in flow rate near the surge point, a further analysis of the flow field structure in the compressor blade passage is conducted. As significant deviations occur in compressor blockage, peak flow rate, and surge flow rate after rotor blade notch damage, a uniform design flow rate is still selected as the primary research condition. Based on the characteristic positions where the notch damage occurs, three characteristic sections - blade tip, mid-blade, and blade root - are chosen. Figures 15(a), (b), and (c) illustrate the distribution of relative Mach numbers at the 95%, 50%, and 15% blade height sections, respectively, near the design flow rate point obtained from simulations.
以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段话：图15(a)、(b)、（c）展示了仿真得到的设计流量点不同叶片模型 95%、50%、15%叶高截面的相对马赫数分布。
Figures 15(a), (b), and (c) illustrate the distribution of relative Mach numbers at the 95%, 50%, and 15% blade height sections, respectively, obtained from simulations at the design flow rate point.

以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段话：根据正常叶片通道流场结构，叶片前缘存在脱体激波，在叶片通道内，叶片前缘的脱体激波落在了压力面侧相邻叶片的吸力面上，形成通道激波，气流经过激波后会发生附面层分离，气流的Ma明显降低，靠近叶片吸力面附面层的Ma降低程度更加显著。由图15可知，在95%、50%、15%特征叶片高度截面，当叶片前缘不同叶片高度发生缺口损伤时，损伤处会变成钝头前缘，气流流经钝头前缘会发生加速效果，Ma增大，形成较为明显的高速区。同时损伤处的钝头前缘会造成叶片前缘脱体激波后低马赫数区域扩大，即脱体激波距离叶片前缘更远。由于缺口损伤叶片的通道内激波位置会向叶片前缘移动，激波后近叶片吸力面附面层会提前发生分离，相应的Ma也会提前下降，并且相较于正常叶片，激波后吸力面附面层分离造成的Ma下降程度更加严重、范围更大，加大叶片尾迹流动损失程度和范围，使压气机出口的流动堵塞更加严重。而对于叶片吸力面的流场结构，受缺口的影响不大。通过对比图15(a)、(b)、(c)，在设计流量点，发现相较于相同叶片高度的正常叶片，缺口位于叶片前缘中部会使叶片尾迹损失加重程度最剧烈。此外，除去发生缺口的叶片高度，其余叶片高度截面的流场结构相较于正常叶片改变程度很小，几乎保持一致。所以后续对于损伤叶片通道流场结构的分析，主要集中在缺口所发生的叶片高度截面

According to the flow field structure of the normal blade passage, there is a detached shock wave at the blade leading edge. Inside the blade passage, the detached shock wave from the leading edge falls onto the suction surface of the adjacent blade on the pressure side, forming a passage shock wave. The airflow experiences boundary layer separation after passing through the shock wave, resulting in a significant decrease in Ma, especially near the suction surface boundary layer. From Figure 15, it can be observed that at the sections of 95%, 50%, and 15% characteristic blade heights, when notch damage occurs at different blade heights of the leading edge, the damaged area becomes a blunted leading edge. Flow acceleration occurs as the airflow passes over the blunted leading edge, leading to an increase in Ma and the formation of a prominent high-speed region. Additionally, the blunted leading edge at the damage location causes the low Mach number region after the detached shock wave from the blade leading edge to expand, i.e., the detached shock wave is further away from the leading edge. Due to the movement of the shock wave position towards the blade leading edge in the channel of the notched damaged blade, premature boundary layer separation occurs closer to the suction surface, resulting in an earlier decrease in Ma and a more severe and extensive reduction in Ma caused by the boundary layer separation compared to a normal blade. This further amplifies the loss and extent of the blade wake flow, causing more severe blockage of the flow at the compressor exit. However, the flow field structure on the suction surface of the blade is not significantly affected by the notch. By comparing Figures 15(a), (b), and (c), it is observed that at the design flow rate point, the notch located in the middle of the blade leading edge causes the most severe increase in blade wake loss compared to a normal blade of the same height. Furthermore, except for the blade height sections where the notch occurs, the flow field structure at other blade height sections changes very little and remains almost consistent with a normal blade. Therefore, subsequent analyses of the flow field structure in the damaged blade passage primarily focus on the sections corresponding to the height of the notch occurrence.
以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段话：此外损伤处的钝头前缘会造成叶片前缘的脱体激波后的低马赫数区域扩大
In addition, the blunted leading edge at the damaged area causes the expansion of the low Mach number region after the detachment of shock waves from the blade leading edge.
以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段话：此外，损伤处的钝头前缘会造成叶片前缘的激波后的低马赫数区域扩大
In addition, the blunted leading edge at the damaged area leads to an expansion of the low Mach number region after the shock wave at the blade leading edge.
